name: PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE
description:
This table stores all information related to the person?s Work Relationships. An Work Relationship denotes a formal relationship between a person and a legal employer.  Therefore, this table will hold information for employees and contingent workers.

Current design allows for a person to have multiple active ?periods of service? as long as they are for different legal entities. This is not Effective Dated.

columns.Name: PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: TERMINATION_ACCEPTED_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person who accepted or authorized employee termination. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: DATE_START
columns.Comments: Start date of the period of employment.

columns.Name: ACCEPTED_TERMINATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when termination of employment was accepted.

columns.Name: ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual date of termination of employment.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_TERMINATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the termination of employment was noted.

columns.Name: PROJECTED_TERMINATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Projected employment termination date.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE
columns.Comments: Adjusted Service Date. For example, a rehire that was part of an acquisition, all of his plans might use original hire date if rehired within 90 days of termination except a 401k plan which might use adjusted service date which was originally populated upon acquisition.

columns.Name: DATE_EMPLOYEE_DATA_VERIFIED
columns.Comments: Date when the employee last verified the data.

columns.Name: FAST_PATH_EMPLOYEE
columns.Comments: Accepts values of ?Yes?  or ?No?.

columns.Name: LAST_WORKING_DATE
columns.Comments: Last Date Worked (for terminated workers).

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Represents Legal Entity.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from Legal Entity.

columns.Name: ON_MILITARY_SERVICE
columns.Comments: Accepts Yes or No values. If Yes, employee is also on military service.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_DATE_OF_HIRE
columns.Comments: Original date of hire.

columns.Name: PERIOD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines whether it is a period of service for an Employee, or Contingent worker: ?E? or ?C?, or ?N?: non-worker.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Accepts Yes or No values. If Yes, this employment period is considered the primary for the Legal Entity.

columns.Name: REHIRE_AUTHORIZOR
columns.Comments: Obsolete

columns.Name: REHIRE_REASON
columns.Comments: If rehire recommendation is ?yes?, then reason from recommending person is tracked via this field.

columns.Name: REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION
columns.Comments: Accepts Yes or No values. If Yes, person is recommended for re-hiring.

columns.Name: WORKER_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an employee or contingent worker. Can be system-generated or manually populated.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This stores a comment associated with termination of work relationship.

columns.Name: WORKER_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This stores a worker comment associated with the Resignation Process.

columns.Name: REHIRE_AUTHORIZER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS. Represents the person who recommends the worker for rehire.

columns.Name: REVOKE_USER_ACCESS
columns.Comments: This stores user?s option of revoking user access on Termination. Values accepted are ?I? for Immediately or ?A? for After termination

columns.Name: READY_TO_CONVERT
columns.Comments: Column to use to convert pending worker to employee based on flag
